scripts.release:dry: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm --filter emviz pack --dry-run
scripts.skills:validate: python ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py skills/em-model && python ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py skills/em-lint && python ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py skills/em-extract
